channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin dips, oil rises as Trump addresses nation on war in Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump said the military is "very close" to finishing its war in Iran in a speech that saw oil and Bitcoin prices move.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $67,000 as US stock market futures hit a new low of day. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9mWFhjc3pzbkU2eDFjVUt1dXdYSTVqdWJ1SVZHRUp3b3RwZXlaaUNWUUxiMDdITjlrTnRnZXY0cXhWeDczdHJxTDhYbDBSNElQbjZXbGdLNmpRR3VyMkk3WnNjVlp3Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX quietly files for IPO, seeking mammoth debut
item.description: An IPO and valuation above $1.75 trillion would make SpaceX a top-10 public company by market capitalization, above the likes of Meta and Tesla.

item.title: Crypto exchange Bithumb to delay IPO until after 2028: Report
item.description: According to the company CFO, Bithumb was “strengthen[ing] accounting policies and internal controls” ahead of its IPO plans, already delayed from 2025.

item.title: US Treasury seeks public input for state-level stablecoin regulations
item.description: The Treasury published its notice of proposed rulemaking as the market capitalization of dollar-pegged stablecoins neared $300 billion.

item.title: These Three Altcoins Just Got Leveraged Crypto ETFs
item.description: Volatility Shares, the company that launched the first leveraged crypto fund in the U.S., is expanding its roster to smaller digital assets

item.title: Hyperliquid whale makes $80M bet on market crash: Is Bitcoin in trouble?
item.description: A Hyperliquid DEX whale has placed an $80 million bet that Bitcoin will crash and oil will rally, but data show this trader has lost millions in the past.

item.title: EDX seeks OCC trust bank charter for institutional crypto custody
item.description: The crypto exchange seeks a charter from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to separate custody from trading and expand services under a regulated banking framework.

item.title: JUST IN: Solana-based crypto DEX 'Drift Protocol' says $270,000,000 hack is "not an April fools joke." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBBMFdNbWFQNm1DQk5QcWxFZTZuamNiTkZKLUdqUEJhLXo5RmFoMlYwTE0wX21KM1djd05Da2ZJeXU3VEFQNmRUaU1YNFJlSGdFckwxYXI2eWVJcVN6Tm56UUd3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Solana-based crypto DEX '…

item.title: Solana DeFi Exchange Drift Protocol Exploited, Upwards of $285 Million Stolen
item.description: Solana-based perpetuals DEX Drift Protocol has suffered an exploit impacting more than $200 million in funds.

item.title: Pro-crypto PAC to be headed by Tether executive ahead of US midterms
item.description: A debate over stablecoin yield, likely to impact Tether, is underway in the US government as lawmakers consider a market structure bill.

item.title: Google's Veo 3.1 Lite Cuts API Costs in Half as OpenAI's Sora Exits the Market
item.description: Google's cheapest video model yet targets developers burned by high generation costs, arriving just days after OpenAI pulled the plug on Sora.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Citadel-backed EDX Markets applies for U.S. trust charter to expand institutional crypto services
item.description: The Citadel-backed exchange is seeking approval to offer custody and asset services as institutional demand grows.

item.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Files Confidentially for Record-Breaking $1.75 Trillion IPO
item.description: Elon Musk’s rocket company has confidentially submitted IPO paperwork to U.S. regulators, potentially setting up one of the largest public listings in history.

item.title: Price predictions 4/1: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, LINK
item.description: Technical charts show Bitcoin and altcoins on the verge of a bullish trend reversal, but Bitcoin’s resistance at $69,000 could cap the current upward momentum.

item.title: Drift Protocol warns users to pause deposits amid 'unusual' trading activity
item.description: The reported incident could be a $200 million exploit of the decentralized crypto exchange due to a leak of a crypto wallet private key.

item.title: Solana DeFi platform Drift confirms 'active attack' as $200M+ leaves platform
item.description: The platform halted deposits while it investigates suspicious activity and urges users to proceed with caution.

item.title: Fed's Barr Says Stablecoins Need Tighter Controls to Fight Money Laundering
item.description: The Fed governor has previously said that stablecoins risk undermining the U.S. central bank’s credibility.

item.title: Nakamoto Bitcoin sale could signal industry-wide DAT contagion: Analyst
item.description: The value of the Bitcoin treasury company's holdings peaked at over $711 million in October 2025, when BTC hit an all-time high of about $126,000.

item.title: Warren Buffett bought $17B in US T-bills: A bad omen for Bitcoin price?
item.description: Buffett called the recent US stock market dip “nothing” versus past 50% crashes, signaling more downside for risk assets like Bitcoin in 2026.

item.title: Galaxy Digital's testnet suffers hack but no client funds or information were compromised
item.description: Mike Novogratz’s crypto financial services firm said unauthorized access was limited to a segregated R&D workspace; trading systems and client accounts were unaffected.

item.title: Naoris launches post-quantum blockchain as quantum security risks gain attention
item.description: Naoris Protocol has launched a post-quantum layer-1 blockchain designed to protect transactions against future cryptographic vulnerabilities.

item.title: CFTC chair says agency is ready to oversee entire crypto market
item.description: Michael Selig summarized his first 100 days overseeing the commodities regulator since being confirmed by the US Senate in December.

item.title: Cambodia Extradites Alleged Huione Crypto Scam Kingpin to China: Report
item.description: Chinese authorities have arrested Li Xiong, former chairman of Huione Group, linked by U.S. regulators to billions in illicit crypto flows.

item.title: JUST IN: A Bitcoin & crypto exchange backed by Citadel Securities applied to be a national trust bank 👀 🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9CX2lORkREZnB4NncxOGVWdGRLOWI5RVNBY3BsNUlNeWp5ckVjaEZ5NkNyM2s3M3pJS0VxNHpzdHp2dHg5RlRTblpLajlJNjZMd3o4NkRUWVFNU2tob3A4cnd3NHFSQzA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: A Bitcoin & crypto…

item.title: Why Meta is choosing partners over power in its 2026 stablecoin push
item.description: Meta’s 2026 stablecoin push favors partnerships over issuing its own coin. Here is why the company is choosing infrastructure and distribution instead.

item.title: The Quantum Threat to Bitcoin Dividing Crypto
item.description: Two papers published this week have reignited debates about the risk posed by “Q-day” to the cryptography that underpins digital assets.

item.title: 🚨🗞️NEW: Bitcoin-Backed Muni Bond Gets First Moody’s Rating; Stablecoin Yield Text Delayed Lots of news this Wednesday. Read it all in today’s @CryptoAmerica_ newsletter from yours truly. ⬇️ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE16b3pUaHkwa2ZFVHFtZWZnczB2TjRhWnRIUlc4MUxGbFBoWXFhX3RyN0R4UDNWZmYxYWVvbnpITF85YkFQVTVkcEhzc25pMG5DNG41TllaT1ZJUTRoLVRRU3dxUDZuQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨🗞️NEW: Bitcoin-Backed Mun…

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Governance is the real Layer 1
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Nilmini Rubin writes on the challenge facing crypto and traditional markets to create a hybrid, shared governance structure. Then, Meredith Fitzpatrick covers how financial institutions must f…

item.title: Bitcoin Gets Its First Bond Rating as Moody's Grades New Hampshire Deal
item.description: Moody's has rated a New Hampshire Bitcoin-backed bond—a first for BTC as direct bond collateral.

item.title: The Protocol: Quantum computing could break Bitcoin sooner, says Google
item.description: Also: OpenAI raises $122 billion, crypto ecosystems diverging post-quantum strategies, and Base’s 2026 roadmap.

item.title: Jamie Dimon signals JPMorgan entry into prediction markets as competition surges
item.description: JPMorgan is weighing a move into prediction markets as crypto firms, startups and rivals like Goldman Sachs race to dominate the fast-growing sector.

item.title: Cango raises capital as it faces NYSE delisting risk with shares below $1
item.description: The bitcoin miner issued a $10 million convertible note and closed a $65 million insider-led round while racing to regain compliance with exchange rules.

item.title: Franklin Templeton to Buy CoinFund Spinoff, Build Out Crypto Investment Offering
item.description: Global asset manager Franklin Templeton is acquiring a CoinFund spinoff to build out its own crypto wing, Franklin Crypto.

item.title: Agencies Must Create Clear Prediction Market Rules to Avoid FTX-Style ‘Implosions’: CFTC Chair
item.description: Michael Selig argued that prediction markets operating offshore in “unregulated space” could lead to an FTX-style collapse.

item.title: Token voting is crypto’s broken incentive system
item.description: Token voting fails crypto governance with low participation and whale dominance. Decision markets price conviction to fix broken DAO incentives.

item.title: Ripple Launches Treasury Management System with Native Digital Asset Capabilities
item.description: The novel platform allows CFOs and their treasury teams to manage fiat and digital assets in a single system, Ripple said.

item.title: Ripple adds digital asset support to treasury management platform
item.description: The update adds digital asset accounts and real-time visibility tools for corporate finance teams managing liquidity across systems.

item.title: Franklin Templeton deepens crypto push with CoinFund spinoff deal
item.description: Franklin Templeton has agreed to acquire CoinFund spinoff 250 Digital to launch Franklin Crypto, a dedicated crypto arm targeting institutional crypto investment management.

item.title: As one of the leading crypto companies, we care deeply about innovation. With innovation comes change - sometimes unwelcome change. In a rapidly evolving world, it's important that the pump fun brand stays not only in touch with culture, but continues to sh - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9jZTJwM1c5MTJjdDRMWGhJX05fYmYxUXFrQmVValNLSFlQWkZVQmtGZjNtWVpYTV9DUG9sTWx5WEZHQURSQThycW1zbU85TVl5NXhFNUVhbEJZV1Vz?oc=5" target="_blank">As one of the leading crypto companies, we…

item.title: Strategy set to resume buying Bitcoin via STRC: Will BTC price hit $80K?
item.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy has raised funds to purchase at least 1,111 BTC this week, increasing the odds of sending prices higher in April.

item.title: Franklin Templeton launches crypto division with 250 Digital acquisition
item.description: The asset manager is creating a new “Franklin Crypto” unit to expand beyond ETFs and target institutional demand for active digital asset strategies.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Avalanche (AVAX) gains 4% as index moves higher
item.description: Hedera (HBAR), up 3.6% from Tuesday, was also among the top performers.

item.title: Hong Kong misses March target for first stablecoin licences
item.description: Hong Kong’s first stablecoin licences failed to materialize by the expected end of March target, with the HKMA saying only that it is still advancing the process.

item.title: Today, we launched Franklin Crypto: a new dedicated, institutional-grade crypto investment management unit. Industry veterans Chris Perkins and Seth Ginns will co-lead Franklin Crypto alongside @FTI_Global’s Tony Pecore. To expand our existing suite of a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9IZlhibDhlWS1IdWZhamFwRXE1X1dRaFdXaF81Wk9COWcyeFpfeFBuRkliX2VNTGxKQUdEMk1RdWQyT2xZaFpRVHhqeVFvM1RWUEhhWDZub0tMYnh5?oc=5" target="_blank">Today, we launched Franklin Crypto: a new …

item.title: Bitcoin’s crashes are shrinking, and Wall Street is starting to notice
item.description: Not all analysts agree that further drawdowns are over, as Bloomberg Analyst Mike McGlone insists the crypto bubble is over and bitcoin could still revisit $10,000.

item.title: OpenAI raises a record $122 billion as revenue crosses $2 billion per month
item.description: The funding round, anchored by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, is the largest private funding in history.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin has closed its first green month after 5 months of red 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE4yVDBrWnAwMEdwdGNmT2JsanZiUm8xUVBtNzM4OVFmdDlSYWhhU1h2R2l5eEp5WU5oZUpaUjVGcng2SW80QnM0akF0ZTZib3ZmYTA1amVtTmJDRS1CcEsyV2tVREpCSkk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin has closed…

item.title: Algorand, Stable Lead Double-Digit Altcoin Surge as Bitcoin Tops $69K
item.description: Experts cite portfolio rebalancing and geopolitical easing as driving the crypto market rally, though caution persists.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: All major broadcast TV networks will be interrupting their programming to air Trump’s address tonight. It seems like a BIG announcement is coming... - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1lVm5zNktRUUtfanZpNzlCejR5ZkkwY3NmR1hwOU9mUGhYNzd2UVo1bmxKUkhJSzUtNUhMNl9QWDEzbjg4TGdmRkJOWjVoSkFkVmpDR0VZVmlzS1V2UUNCaGNR?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: All major broadcast TV…

item.title: Grayscale’s research head says tokenization will happen in waves and explains how to play it
item.description: Investors looking to bet on tokenization should think in phases, with institution-friendly networks like Canton likely winning first and Avalanche, Ethereum capturing more upside later, Grayscale's Zach Pandl said.

item.title: Brazil's B3 exchange to offer bitcoin-linked 'event contracts' for the ultra-rich
item.description: The contracts are regulated by Brazil's securities regulator and designed for professional investors with at least 10 million reais ($1.9 million) in assets.

item.title: Jack Dorsey says AI should replace the middle manager after Block cuts 4,000 jobs
item.description: Dorsey's plan strips out middle management, with AI handling coordination, product decisions, and internal alignment.

item.title: We got a ticker for the upcoming iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF: $BITA They just filed an amended S-1 for this highly anticipated sequel. No fee yet tho. My over/under is 38bps. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1idVFpT3d4Q3NtMEllUWo2WFJlSzl2eVp1d2g4VFNjZmVtOGIxVTBoT01sWkgyczc3UEkyUFN2bVJpcFNBLXhkLUFodndrWFdtZUpVc1psZnJPZ1g2OFRXeWl1LWo?oc=5" target="_blank">We got a ticker for the upcomin…

item.title: Smart money is hedging bitcoin more aggressively than ether :Crypto Daybook Americas
item.description: Your day-ahead look for April 1, 2026

item.title: Crypto Fund Manager CoinShares Begins Trading on Nasdaq via SPAC Deal
item.description: European crypto asset manager CoinShares positions for U.S. expansion as institutional players consolidate market share against Wall Street giants.

item.title: Crypto rebounds as oil dips on Trump comments, but derivatives signal weak conviction
item.description: Bitcoin and ether rise alongside altcoins, yet muted open interest suggests the rally may rely on spot demand and short covering rather than strong leverage.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs post first monthly inflows since October as price stabilizes
item.description: ETF AUM fell just 7% from the October highs, highlighting resilience despite a 50% price decline.

item.title: Uniswap Foundation held $85.8M at year-end, committed $26M in grants during 2025
item.description: Unaudited financials show the DeFi protocol's foundation had runway through January 2027 before the UNIfication governance overhaul passed in late December.
